label: AppleScript • scripted create-then-verify
query: Add a note named 'Roadmap' with the provided body; create it if it doesn't exist.
notes: Model-free CI anchor for the find-or-create mechanic (the A3 prompt rule's target behavior). Step 1 creates the note with `make new note` (body via {{content}}); the mock 'app world' records the new note under its name. Step 2 reads the body back, proving the created note is addressable and the body round-tripped. No tokens.

appleScript.content:
Roadmap:
1. Ship the evals
2. Tune the harness
scriptedCalls: {"script":"tell application \"Notes\" to make new note with properties {name:\"Roadmap\", body:\"{{content}}\"}"}
{"script":"tell application \"Notes\" to return body of note \"Roadmap\""}

finalState.equals:
Roadmap:
1. Ship the evals
2. Tune the harness
